creator: citycat4@ngs.ru
text:
databases/hsqldb port is obsolete. Now exist version 1.8.0.9, but port referred
still at 1.8.0.7. When I had tried use external hsqldb when build OpenOffice
from ports, configure said "your hsqldb jar file is too old, at least 1.8.0.9
required". Patch to move to 1.8.0.9 is extremely trivial - only change one
digit :-)))

Fix: apply patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to build OpenOffice with external hsqldb jar file
